_publications._publicationTitle: ALTERED CALCIUM CURRENTS AND AXONAL GROWTH IN Nf1 HAPLOINSUFFICIENT MICE.

_contextSnippet: potassium (50 mM KCl)-stimulated glutamate release was ~45% higher in neurons from Nf1 cells compared with wild-type cells
resourceName: Amplex Red glutamic acid/glutamate oxidase assay kit
details: Successfully measured glutamate release from cortical neurons, detecting ~45% higher stimulated release in Nf1(+/-) versus wild-type
